response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The vocal performance matches the reference lyrics for 'Laser Beam' perfectly. For the second song, 'Debayashi Japonism', there was no reference lyric input, so manual transcription and translation were completed.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the 'Laser Beam' reference lyrics. Transcribed and translated the entire performance of 'Debayashi Japonism' manually using on-screen lyric assets as primary guide.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were synchronized precisely to the character's vocal onset and offset, adjusting transition points to align directly with rapid vocal phrasing without overlap or cascading delays. Spoken introduction and MC lines were appropriately paced.

subtitles.original: 寄ってらっしゃい 見てらっしゃい
subtitles.english: Come one, come all, take a look!

subtitles.original: 始まりました！らでん新衣装お披露目3Dライブ！
subtitles.english: It has begun! Raden's new outfit reveal 3D live!

subtitles.original: 今宵はまだまだこれから！皆さん、一緒に盛り上がっていきましょう！
subtitles.english: Tonight is just getting started! Everyone, let's fire things up together!

subtitles.original: 尽きない好奇心 素晴らしいジャポニズムに触れて
subtitles.english: An endless curiosity, touching upon wonderful Japonism...

subtitles.original: 令和の風雲児 皆々にお届けいたしましょう
subtitles.english: The child of the winds and clouds of Reiwa, let's deliver it to everyone!

subtitles.original: 饒舌に情熱 伝えたい愛に溢れている
subtitles.english: A passionate eloquence, overflowing with the love I want to convey...

subtitles.original: 無知の知がきっと 素敵な始まりになるんだよ
subtitles.english: The awareness of my ignorance will surely be a wonderful beginning!

subtitles.original: 知って欲しい たらふく味わって
subtitles.english: I want you to know, to savor it to the fullest...

subtitles.original: 紐解いた歴史に 心惹かれていく
subtitles.english: My heart is drawn to the history we've unraveled.

subtitles.original: 遥か遠く 電波に乗って あなたまで
subtitles.english: Riding the airwaves from far away to reach you...

subtitles.original: この想い 純粋に伝えたい 新しい世界 見せてあげる
subtitles.english: I want to purely convey these feelings. New world... I'll show you!

subtitles.original: 開口一番やっちゃって
subtitles.english: Right off the bat, let's do it!

subtitles.original: 金字塔パンチライン 時を超え

subtitles.english: Set it to our theme music!

subtitles.original: 寄ってらっしゃい 見てらっしゃい
subtitles.english: Come one, come all, take a look!
